name: Aaron Flores
headline: Desktop Support Specialist
about: Aaron is a Desktop Support Specialist with a strong foundation in both IT and mechanical systems. Growing within one company has given him a holistic understanding of organizational workflows and how reliable technical support keeps operations running smoothly. His background in mechanics strengthens his diagnostic abilities and supports a hands-on, solutions-driven approach to troubleshooting. Aaron is actively expanding his computer science knowledge and applying new technical skills to grow within the IT field. He values curiosity, integrity, and collaborative problem-solving, and believes in building work cultures that support long-term success.

education.school: City Colleges of Chicago – Harold Washington College

experience.title: Desktop Support Specialist
experience.description: Provides IT support, hardware installation, system troubleshooting, and technical assistance for internal users. Leverages mechanical and technical experience to diagnose issues and maintain smooth day-to-day operations.

team_reason: Aaron brings strong troubleshooting skills and systems knowledge, helping the team understand real-world IT workflows and support structures.
availability: Currently employed; available with 2 weeks' notice
remote_preference: Open to remote, hybrid, or on-site
relocation: Based in the Greater Chicago Area; open to relocation for the right opportunity
work_authorization: Authorized to work in the U.S. without sponsorship

She balances academic excellence with hands-on leadership responsibilities, developing both technical and interpersonal skills that support her long-term goals in tech. name: Ezza May De La Cruz
headline: Freight Forwarding Analyst | Computer Science Student
about: Ezza has three years of experience in Supply Chain Solutions, progressing from data entry to an analyst role in freight forwarding operations. She collaborates with cross-functional teams to improve AP efficiency, build internal web tools, centralize data, and enhance workflow visibility. Her diverse background across lifeguarding, aviation ground operations, fast-food service, and administrative roles has shaped her into an adaptable, people-focused professional. She is completing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and enjoys live music, gaming, camping, cooking, and learning new technologies.

experience.description: Manages freight forwarding operations, AP workflow optimization, and account visibility. Builds internal web tools, centralizes data, and collaborates with cross-functional teams to improve process efficiency.

experience.title: Ramp Agent
experience.description: Supported aviation operations including baggage handling, aircraft servicing, and time-critical ground operations in fast-paced environments.

name: Rasheed Johnson
headline: Journeyman Electrician & Army National Guard
about: Rasheed is a motivated and detail-oriented technical professional with over a decade of experience in electrical systems, logistics, and hands-on technical operations across both civilian and military environments. As a Journeyman Electrician at Amtrak and a member of the Army National Guard, he has developed strong leadership abilities, operational discipline, and the ability to perform under high-pressure conditions. He has extensive experience tracking, interpreting, and managing large datasets to support maintenance workflows and system reliability. Currently pursuing a B.S. in Computer Science, Rasheed has a strong foundation in programming, data structures, and analytics, and is focused on using technology to improve processes, extract insights, and support data-driven decision-making.

experience.title: Journeyman Electrician
experience.description: Performs electrical system maintenance, diagnostics, and troubleshooting for rail operations and infrastructure. Manages technical workflows and ensures system reliability in high-demand environments.

experience.title: Soldier
experience.description: Serves in logistics and technical operations with over 10 years of leadership experience. Manages equipment, coordinates teams, and supports mission readiness through disciplined operational execution.

team_reason: Rasheed’s operational discipline, troubleshooting experience, and structured thinking help ensure the chatbot’s logic is reliable and well‑organized.

remote_preference: Open to remote, hybrid, or on-site
relocation: Based in Chicago, IL; open to relocation
